parameters.query: SELECT stage, COUNT(*) AS deal_count, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_value FROM zoho_deals WHERE stage NOT IN ('Closed Won', 'Closed Lost') GROUP BY stage ORDER BY CASE stage WHEN 'Qualification' THEN 1 WHEN 'Proposal' THEN 2 WHEN 'Negotiation' THEN 3 END;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS invoices_paid, COALESCE(SUM(total), 0) AS revenue FROM zoho_invoices WHERE status = 'Paid' AND paid_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE);
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(balance_due), 0) AS total_overdue FROM zoho_invoices WHERE status = 'Overdue';

SELECT priority, COUNT(*) AS count FROM zoho_tickets WHERE status NOT IN ('Closed') GROUP BY priority ORDER BY CASE priority WHEN 'Urgent' THEN 1 WHEN 'High' THEN 2 WHEN 'Medium' THEN 3 WHEN 'Low' THEN 4 END;

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'expiring_soon') AS expiring, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'active') AS active, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM warranty_claims WHERE status IN ('open', 'investigating')) AS open_claims FROM warranty_registrations;

SELECT deal_name, stage, amount, closing_date, owner_name FROM zoho_deals WHERE closing_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '7 days' AND stage NOT IN ('Closed Won', 'Closed Lost') ORDER BY closing_date ASC LIMIT 10;
SELECT entity_type, status, completed_at, records_synced FROM zoho_sync_log ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1;

meta.description: GET /webhook/daily-flash — Company intelligence surface. Returns pipeline summary, revenue MTD, overdue invoices, open tickets, warranty alerts, deals closing this week, and Zoho sync status. Used by the Daily Flash Glance page.
